details.goal: Navigate to https://practicetestautomation.com/practice-test-students/ and verify the students page loads with a table of student data visible
Navigate to https://practicetestautomation.com/practice-test-exceptions/ and verify the exceptions page loads with the expected content and buttons visible
Navigate to https://practicetestautomation.com/practice-test-login/ and verify the page loads with the login form visible including username input, password input, and submit button

details.reason: tool=navigate params=map[url:https://practicetestautomation.com/practice-test-login/] reason=Navigate to the specified URL to access the login page.

tool=wait_for params=map[selector:table state:visible] reason=Wait for the table of student data to be visible to ensure the students page has loaded correctly.
tool=wait_for params=map[selector:body state:visible] reason=Ensure that the page content is fully loaded before verifying the presence of expected content and buttons.
tool=wait_for params=map[selector:#username state:visible] reason=Wait for the username input field to be visible to ensure the login form has loaded.
tool=get_html params=map[selector:body] reason=Retrieve the HTML of the page body to verify the expected content and buttons are present on the exceptions page.

tool=get_text params=map[selector:.btn] reason=Verify that the expected buttons are present and visible on the exceptions page.
tool=finish params=map[] reason=The goal of navigating to the exceptions page and verifying the expected content and buttons are visible has been achieved.

details.goal: Navigate to https://practicetestautomation.com/practice-test-file-upload/ and verify the file upload page loads with a file input field and upload button visible

tool=wait_for params=map[selector:#submit state:visible] reason=Wait for the submit button to be visible to ensure the login form is fully loaded and all necessary elements are present.

tool=finish params=map[] reason=The login form is visible with all necessary elements (username input, password input, and submit button), indicating the page has loaded successfully and the goal is achieved.
